videos.headline: Rocco Becht finds Dominic Overby for Cyclones TD
videos.description: Rocco Becht airs one out to Dominic Overby to put the Cyclones up 7-0.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Rocco Becht finds Dominic Overby for Cyclones TD) 2025/08/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jayce Brown hauls in 37-yard TD
videos.description: Jayce Brown takes the 37-yard pass from Avery Johnson into the end zone, leveling Iowa State, 14-14.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jayce Brown hauls in 37-yard TD ) 2025/08/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Avery Johnson finds Jerand Bradley for 65-yard TD
videos.description: Jerand Bradley pulls down the 65-yard strike from Avery Johnson to cut Iowa State's lead to 24-21.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Avery Johnson finds Jerand Bradley for 65-yard TD) 2025/8/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Aiden Flora recovers muffed punt for Iowa State
videos.description: Aiden Flora recovers the muffed punt caused by Tre Bell to give the Cyclones great field position.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Aiden Flora recovers muffed punt for Iowa State) 2025/08/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Slippery conditions lead to Kansas State fumble recovery
videos.description: Austin Romaine recovers the ball for the Wildcats as it slips out of the hands of Cyclones' Abu Sama III on the pitch.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Slippery conditions lead to Kansas State fumble recovery) 2025/08/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Avery Johnson keeps it himself for a Kansas State TD
videos.description: Avery Johnson fakes the handoff then runs it in for the Wildcats to make it 7-7.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Avery Johnson keeps it himself for a Kansas State TD) 2025/08/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Joe Jackson loses the ball and Iowa State recovers
videos.description: Drew Surges forces Joe Jackson to fumble to give Iowa State the ball back.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Joe Jackson loses the ball and Iowa State recovers) 2025/08/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brett Eskildsen hauls in the 24-yard TD
videos.description: Rocco Becht finds Brett Eskildsen in the endzone to make it 14-7 Iowa State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Brett Eskildsen hauls in the 24-yard TD) 2025/08/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Rocco Becht dives into the end zone for a Cyclones TD
videos.description: Rocco Becht scrambles his way into the end zone to put the Cyclones up 24-14.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Rocco Becht dives into the end zone for a Cyclones TD) 2025/08/23 ESHEET
